Article Title: Parliament adjourns for 2nd day as opposition protests continue
Article Text:
The session was adjourned amid ruckus

NEW DELHI: Parliament proceedings were washed out for the second consecutive day Tuesday as opposition members continued with their protests inside Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha over multiple issues, including police lathi-charge on those protesting NEET paper leak and alleged Ram temple donation theft. Both Houses were adjourned for the day after witnessing repeated disruptions.As soon as Lok Sabha took up the first question at 11am, opposition MPs started raising slogans despite being assured by Speaker Om Birla that they would get time to raise their issues as per rules. Birla, however, adjourned proceedings till 12 noon when the MPs did not relent.Similar scenes prevailed when the House reassembled. Ministers laid parliamentary documents amid the din before LS adjourned for the second time till 2pm and later for the day.Rajya Sabha too witnessed similar scenes and multiple adjournments before finally adjourning for the day. Earlier, after official papers were laid on the table of the House, leader of the opposition Mallikarjun Kharge rose to speak on the police action against students, alleging that they were lathi-charged and police also used tear gas Monday.His remarks triggered slogan-shouting by treasury bench members. The opposition raised counter-slogans, leading to the first adjournment. Rajya Sabha was adjourned for the day during the second half amid the din.
Article Summary: Both Houses were adjourned for the day after witnessing repeated disruptions. The session was adjourned amid ruckus over police lathi-charge on those protesting NEET paper leak and alleged Ram temple donation theft. As soon as Lok Sabha took up the first question at 11am, opposition MPs started raising slogans.

Article Title: Times Prime's Aeonic partners with Sisters in Sweat to host premium mixed football tournament
Article Text:
Football tournament

About Times Prime Aeonic

About Sisters in Sweat

MUMBAI: Times Prime today announced a strategic partnership with Sisters In Sweat (SIS), India's largest sports and wellness community for women, to launch a premium Mixed Gender (Sisters & Misters) Football Tournament, In Mumbai. The event is curated by Aeonic, Times Prime's newly launched wellness membership, and marks one of the first initiatives of its kind to bring a premium wellness brand directly into community sport.The tournament will take place on Saturday, 25th July 2026, at the Wings Sports Centre in Bandra West. It is designed for corporate and recreational athletes alike, and supports a shared goal: making holistic well-being and active sport part of everyday life.Aeonic by Times Prime is a premium wellness membership built for people who see health as a long-term investment, not a one-off effort. It brings together category leaders across fitness, nutrition tracking, mental clarity, diagnostics, and recovery — including Cult.fit, Apollo, Roundglass, and MediBuddy — into a single membership. This removes the usual hassle of managing health and wellness across multiple, disconnected providers.Partnering with Sisters In Sweat — founded by professional footballer Tanvie Hans and elite fitness coach Swetha Subbiah — is a natural extension of Aeonic's philosophy. SIS is known for reducing the dropout rate of women in sport after their education ends, and offers a proven, real-world model for building active, community-driven habits that last.SIS and Aeonic will provide premium pitches, official footballs, team bibs, hydration stations, clean washrooms, curated snacks, giveaways, and on-site parking for all registered athletes. Teams are required to bring matching jerseys/kits, personal water bottles, and any preferred snacks. Tournament rules and fixtures will be shared with registered team captains closer to the event date.Commenting on the launch, Harshita Singh, Business Head, Times Prime, said:"Wellness today needs consistency and community, not one-off efforts. With Aeonic, we've brought health and lifestyle benefits together into one experience, and our collaboration with Sisters In Sweat extends that philosophy through sport."“We are very excited to partner with Times Prime group to the bring the Aeonic wellness experience to our Sisters in Sweat community. This football tournament will be the perfect blend of active community members competing and showcasing movement at its best and receiving the aeonic wellness package as a goody is the perfect reward for a well played game! We look forward to more collaborations with the Times Group in bringing sport, wellness and well being to women in India. ” - Swetha Subbiah, Founder SISLeading wellness brands, including Healthy Binge, Worthy Cart, and Relow, have partnered with Aeonic and Sisters In Sweat to enhance the event experience with a curated lineup of giveaways. Participants will also get access to a specially curated Aeonic membership experience — a preview of a more connected, holistic approach to health, fitness, and everyday wellness.Registration and event discovery are live now. Teams can secure their slots through the official event listing on the Times Prime app. Visit www.timesaeonic.com to know more about the product.Aeonic by Times Prime is an exclusive wellness-driven membership crafted for those who believe health is the truest form of luxury. From fitness and nutrition to mental clarity, sports, recovery, and preventive care, Aeonic seamlessly connects every pillar of your well-being under one roof. Learn more at www.timesaeonic.com Sisters in Sweat (SIS) is India's largest community-led women's sports and wellness platform, on a mission to get every woman moving and create a global sisterhood. What began in 2017 with 7 women has grown to 17,000+ members across six cities: Bengaluru, Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Chennai, and Mysore, with an expansion into 6 new cities underway this year. Through its women-first community and its mixed-gender Sisters & Misters format, SIS brings people together to show up, train, and belong. Learn more at https://sistersinsweat.com/
Article Summary: Aeonic by Times Prime is a premium wellness membership built for people who see health as a long-term investment, not a one-off effort. The tournament will take place on Saturday, 25th July 2026, at the Wings Sports Centre in Bandra West.

How Enzo Fernández builds his net worth fortune

Business ventures and investments of Enzo Fernández

Enzo Fernández’s lifestyle and family life

Legacy of Enzo Fernández in football

How will Enzo Fernández use his money after retirement?

Enzo Fernández has become one of the biggest names in world football. The Argentine midfielder plays for Chelsea and remains a key player for both club and country. Alongside him, his longtime partner Valentina Cervantes has built a strong social media presence through brand collaborations and digital content.As of 2026, according to the estimates from Celebrity Net Worth, the couple’s combined net worth is estimated at around $35 million, with most of that wealth coming from Enzo’s football career. Fans have been searching for their finances after Enzo’s continued success in the Premier League, his long-term Chelsea contract, and growing commercial appeal.Their income mainly comes from football salary, bonuses, endorsement deals, social media partnerships, and investments. While they enjoy a comfortable lifestyle, they have largely stayed away from flashy public spending.Enzo Fernández's estimated net worth in 2026 is estimated around $33 million. His main income is his Chelsea contract, which is reported to be about £180,000 per week, plus there are performance related bonuses that can add extra.Before he joined Chelsea in 2023, he played for River Plate and Benfica, and that ascent helped set up one of football’s major transfers in the first place.Since then, career earnings have stayed on the rise, driven by wages, incentives and sponsorship agreements, so it’s not only salary.Valentina Cervantes is estimated to have around $2 million in net worth. She makes money via social media partnerships, lifestyle posts, fashion collaborations and brand promotions.Her earnings are way smaller than Enzo’s, still, she has carved out her own identity as an influencer, and that momentum seems to keep growing over time.Most of Enzo Fernandez’s wealth comes from the whole football sport. His jump from River Plate to Benfica, opened the door for European football, and when he started playing for Argentina, also during the 2022 FIFA World Cup, his market value shot up. Then Chelsea came in and signed him for a club-record transfer, so he ended up with a long-term contract, with a pretty high salary.Now, aside from his salary Enzo also pockets money from endorsement deals, appearance fees and commercial partnerships. His sponsorship set is still expanding, so his earnings off the pitch might rise even more in the next few years.Unlike some football stars who own several companies, Enzo has kept his investments fairly simple so far.From the reports and the public info, he tends to put money in real estate and also in longer-term financial planning, rather than trying to start big enterprises. As of now there is no confirmed info that would show he controls a huge business empire or something like that. A lot of financial experts usually nudge young football players to go for steady investments early on, and Enzo looks like he does the same type of thing, just quietly.Away from football, Enzo spends most of his time with Valentina Cervantes and their children. The couple regularly shares family moments on social media but generally keeps their personal life private.They own luxury vehicles and live comfortably, but they are not known for showing an extravagant lifestyle. Enzo has also been seen wearing premium watches from well-known luxury brands during public appearances, although he has never publicly revealed a large watch collection. Their focus appears to be on family, travel and maintaining a balanced lifestyle.Even though he is still in the early years of his career, Enzo has already achieved what many players dream of. Winning the FIFA World Cup with Argentina and becoming one of Chelsea’s key midfielders has already secured his place among the country’s top footballers of his generation.If he continues performing at the highest level, both his football legacy and his financial value are expected to grow over the coming years.It is too early to know Enzo’s exact retirement plans, but many former footballers move into coaching, football academies, media work or business after leaving the game.Considering his careful financial attitude so far, he can keep buying real estate, broaden his investment mix, or back football development work in Argentina. With solid money planning during his playing years, he’ll probably have a lot of choices once retirement comes, including the ability to do more than just one thing at a time.
Article Summary: Enzo Fernández and Valentina Cervantes’ combined net worth is estimated at around $35 million. Their income mainly comes from football salary, bonuses, endorsement deals, social media partnerships, and investments. While they enjoy a comfortable lifestyle, they have largely stayed away from flashy public spending.

Article Title: NBA free agency rumor: Boston Celtics and Miami Heat collide in a bidding war for 6-foot-4 ex-Clippers guard
Article Text:
Heat and Cl​ippers. Image via: Heat and Clippers​

Category Detail Player Bradley Beal Current status Unrestricted free agent, declined Clippers option Teams reportedly interested Boston Celtics, Miami Heat Expected contract Veteran minimum or close to it Declined 2026-27 cap hit $5.6 million Signing likelihood Uncertain, tied to LeBron James's decision Latest insider update Jake Fischer, Bleacher Report Boston cap-clearing option Sam Hauser (three years, $45 million remaining)

Which teams are interested in Bradley Beal?

Bradley Beal. Image via: Barry Gossage/NBAE via Getty Images

Miami Heat: needs backcourt depth and shooting after the Antetokounmpo trade, but won't move until LeBron decides

Boston Celtics: has an open roster spot and a scoring gap since trading Jaylen Brown to Philadelphia, plus the Tatum connection

What are insiders saying about the rumor?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How signing Beal could impact both teams

Bradley Beal's free agency is turning into a two-team race, with the Boston Celtics and Miami Heat both showing real interest in the veteran guard. Beal declined his $5.6 million player option with the LA Clippers this offseason, becoming an unrestricted free agent after a season wrecked by hip surgery. NBA insider Jake Fischer reports both teams are circling, though neither appears ready to move until LeBron James makes his own free agency decision.Beal's Boston ties run through Jayson Tatum, a fellow St. Louis native who has publicly talked up a potential pairing. Miami's interest predates this latest report and lines up with the roster gaps the Heat are still sorting out after trading for Giannis Antetokounmpo. At 33 and coming off a six-game season, Beal isn't the player who once averaged 31.3 points a night in Washington, but he's cheap enough that either contender could take the swing.Fischer said Beal's decision is being shaped by LeBron's situation even if it isn't the deciding factor, and that Miami has genuine interest. According to Fischer, the Boston Celtics remain a possibility for Bradley Beal due to his relationship with Jayson Tatum.Fischer has consistently pointed to a team with playoff aspirations as the likely landing spot. Beal isn't expected to command more than the veteran minimum, which fits a league where the new CBA punishes overspending.His health, not his talent, remains the swing factor teams are weighing."I was told today that Beal’s decision is not exactly being held up by LeBron, but is being impacted by it. I do think there’s some Miami interest there, and I would not rule out Boston for Beal because of the connection with Jayson Tatum,” Jake Fischer said "Beal is definitely going to be signed by a team with playoff aspirations, that is my understanding there."Beal's Clippers deal was a two-year, $11 million contract negotiated after a buyout with Phoenix. Boston currently sits $1.7 million below the luxury tax, meaning signing Beal would push the Celtics back into tax territory. Trading Hauser, with Baylor Scheierman ready to absorb minutes, would give Boston a path to both add Beal and reset the repeater tax. Beal certainly has ambition to go beyond the number of his player option with the Clippers. He declined his $5.6 million 2026-27 player option.For Miami, Beal would add floor spacing to a roster thin on shooting after the Antetokounmpo deal. For Boston, he'd offer scoring punch post-Jaylen Brown, though pairing two oft-injured veterans in Beal and George carries its own risk that Brad Stevens would have to manage through the season.Nothing moves until LeBron sets the market. Once he signs, expect Miami and Boston to move fast, with Beal's health screening likely to decide which offer he takes.
Article Summary: Bradley Beal's free agency is turning into a two-team race. The Boston Celtics and Miami Heat are both showing real interest in the veteran guard. Beal declined his $5.6 million player option with the LA Clippers this offseason.

Article Title: 'Argentina players shouldn't be suspended': Spain's Gavi breaks silence on Leandro Paredes clash after World Cup final
Article Text:
Leandro Paredes in a heated moment with Spain midfielder Gavi after the FIFA World Cup final

Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in a tense FIFA World Cup 2026 final to lift their second title. The match ended on a heated note, with Argentina reduced to 10 men after Enzo Fernandez was sent off.After the final whistle, emotions boiled over as Spain midfielder Gavi got into a confrontation with Leandro Paredes, while Argentina assistant coach Roberto Ayala was seen striking Dani Olmo.Despite being involved in the post-match scuffle, the Barcelona midfielder does not believe Argentina's players should face suspensions.Speaking to Cope, Gavi said: ”No, no. To tell you the truth, I don’t think they should be suspended. I understand it’s not a good image for the kids, for the children, but I think there’s also that side of football that’s a bit more aggressive.”He added that any punishment should have been dealt with during the game itself rather than afterwards.“Perhaps the most logical thing for me would be to send him off during the match and that’s it. But as I said, in the end I think it’s all football and it always has to be that way,” he noted.Although Gavi has urged against further punishment, FIFA has already launched an investigation into the incidents that took place after the final whistle.Reports suggest that several Argentina players could still face disciplinary action depending on the outcome of the investigation. The governing body is expected to review the confrontations before deciding whether any additional sanctions are necessary.
Article Summary: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in a tense FIFA World Cup 2026 final to lift their second title. The match ended on a heated note, with Argentina reduced to 10 men after Enzo Fernandez was sent off. After the final whistle, Spain midfielder Gavi got into a confrontation with Leandro Paredes. Argentina assistant coach Roberto Ayala was seen striking Dani Olmo.

Article Title: No apology: Argentina's Leandro Paredes breaks silence after World Cup final chaos against Spain as FIFA investigates
Article Text:
Spain's Gavi, left, falls as he scuffles with Argentina's Leandro Paredes (5) and Thiago Almada. (AP Photo)

FIFA opens disciplinary investigation



Violent scenes overshadow Spain's triumph



Argentina midfielder Leandro Paredes has broken his silence following the chaotic scenes that marred the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, but noticeably stopped short of apologising for his role in the post-match fracas as FIFA launched an official investigation into the incidents.Spain's historic 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina to lift their second World Cup title was overshadowed by an ugly confrontation moments after the final whistle, with Paredes among the central figures caught on camera during the melee.In his first public statement since the final, the Argentine midfielder reflected on the team's campaign and thanked supporters, but made no reference to the violent altercation that erupted during Spain's celebrations."Thank you, Argentina! I love you today and always. Today, I write with a heavy heart, having been unable to bring our country the joy it so richly deserves. But with a chest full of pride for having given everything we had and for flying our flag at the very top once again!" Paredes wrote on Instagram.He also praised his teammates, adding: "Thank you to everyone who was part of this national team. To this group of players who gave their all to represent this jersey, fighting for it until the very last second of every match! It was an honour to be part of the best Argentine national team in history."The post, however, contained no apology or acknowledgement of the post-match confrontation that has since become the focus of worldwide attention.The governing body confirmed on Monday that it has opened disciplinary proceedings into the incidents that unfolded after the final whistle.In an official statement, FIFA said: "Following an assessment of the relevant match reports for the FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina, and in line with Article 36 of the FIFA Disciplinary Code, the FIFA Disciplinary Committee has appointed a Disciplinary and Ethics Prosecutor to investigate potential breaches of the FIFA Disciplinary Code with regard to the post-match incidents."FIFA did not provide a timeline for the investigation or identify individual players, but the appointment of a disciplinary prosecutor raises the possibility of retrospective sanctions if breaches of the code are established.Earlier reports suggested Paredes had been shown a red card after the match. However, that dismissal did not remain on the official record, meaning he escaped immediate punishment on the night despite the controversy, as per a BBC report.Television footage captured several flashpoints as Spain celebrated their World Cup success.Paredes appeared to grab Spain defender Eric Garcia around the throat before shoving him to the ground. When Gavi attempted to intervene, the Argentine midfielder was seen pushing the Barcelona youngster to the turf and grappling with him during the confrontation.Argentina defender Nahuel Molina was also involved after appearing to swing a punch toward Spain captain Rodri before the Manchester City midfielder confronted him. Veteran defender Nicolas Otamendi was then seen engaging Rodri in a heated verbal exchange as tensions escalated.Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni and several players eventually stepped in to separate those involved and restore order.The controversy did not end there. Argentina's players also drew criticism after they stood facing their own supporters with their backs turned as Spain collected the World Cup trophy, an act many interpreted as disrespectful toward the newly crowned champions.With FIFA's investigation now underway, Paredes' decision to focus solely on Argentina's pride-filled campaign — without addressing the violence that overshadowed the final — has only intensified scrutiny over the midfielder's conduct as world football awaits the governing body's verdict.
Article Summary: Leandro Paredes has broken his silence following the chaotic scenes that marred the 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The Argentine midfielder stopped short of apologising for his role in the post-match fracas. FIFA has opened disciplinary proceedings into the incidents that unfolded after the final whistle.

Article Title: 'When I needed someone, he was there': PV Sindhu recalls Virat Kohli's role in comeback
Article Text:
PV Sindhu credits Virat Kohli for comeback (Image: Agencies)

Datta Sai reveals Kohli's influence







Historic Japan Open victory completes Comeback



PV Sindhu has opened up on how a conversation with Virat Kohli helped her overcome one of the most difficult phases of her career following a serious injury in 2025, eventually inspiring a remarkable comeback that culminated in a historic Japan Open title.The two-time Olympic medallist suffered a torn toe ligament during training in September 2025, forcing her to cut short her season and focus entirely on rehabilitation. Under the supervision of renowned sports orthopaedist Dr. Dinshaw Pardiwala, Sindhu underwent three months of complete rest followed by an extensive rehabilitation programme.During that challenging period, Sindhu, accompanied by her husband Venkata Datta Sai, reached out to Kohli seeking guidance. The former India captain responded almost immediately, and the trio met the very next day.Sharing the emotional moment on X while reposting her husband's interview with The Indian Express, Sindhu revealed how the meeting became a turning point in her recovery."One thing I'll always be grateful for, though, is Virat bhai. I reached out to him at one of the lowest points of my career. Injuries were piling up, the results weren't coming, and I just needed someone who understood.He replied within minutes, and we met the very next day. What we spoke about will always stay between us. But I'll always be grateful that when I needed someone, he was there. He didn't say much, but every word stayed with Datta and me. Some conversations change the way you see things. That was one of them,'' Sindhu wrote on X.In his interview with The Indian Express, Sindhu's husband Venkata Datta Sai explained how Kohli's words continued to inspire them throughout the recovery process."We had to rebuild her joy, and Virat's words kept ringing in my head. At Atlanta's Exos Sports Performance facility, she trained with three excellent trainers, Wayne, Tim and Rayan," Datta recalled.The comeback reached its perfect conclusion on July 19, 2026, when Sindhu scripted history by winning the Japan Open women's singles title, becoming the first Indian shuttler across any discipline to lift the prestigious crown in the tournament's 43-year history. Ranked World No. 12 entering the tournament, the 31-year-old produced a clinical performance in the final at the Tokyo Metropolitan Gymnasium, defeating home favourite and World No. 3 Akane Yamaguchi 21-17, 21-17 in straight games.
Article Summary: PV Sindhu has opened up on how a conversation with Virat Kohli helped her overcome one of the most difficult phases of her career. The two-time Olympic medallist suffered a torn toe ligament during training in September 2025, forcing her to cut short her season and focus entirely on rehabilitation. Sindhu underwent three months of complete rest followed by an extensive rehabilitation programme. The comeback reached its perfect conclusion on July 19, 2026, when Sindhu scripted history by winning the Japan Open women's singles title, becoming the first Indian shuttler across any discipline to lift the prestigious crown.

Article Title: A fragile fitness system? Hamstring injuries put Team India, CoE under scanner
Article Text:
Nitish Kumar Reddy (PTI Photo)

Players pushed without clear plan



Little support between assignments



Poll Vote & Share your view What approach do you think is most important for preventing injuries in the Indian cricket team? Better fitness management Better workload planning 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

NEW DELHI: India’s ODI and Test captain Shubman Gill expressed concern over his team’s fitness standards after the ODI series defeat in England. A string of players breaking down before or during series has repeatedly left the team hamstrung over the past year. Gill suggested that India might be missing a trick in managing players’ fitness.His comments have brought into focus the breakdown of a system built on coordination between the Indian team management and the Centre of Excellence (CoE). Not long ago, India had all their key players fit and available for three ICC events in 2023, 2024 and 2025. TOI understands that some senior players are struggling to adapt to a new system following a change in personnel last year. The most worrying aspect has been the recurrence of hamstring injuries.“The flurry of recent hamstring injuries suggests that the players may not have been absolutely fit before taking the field. There seems to be a gap in communication about a player’s fitness status and workload between the CoE and the team management,” a BCCI source said. The CoE has not appointed a head of medical staff since Nitin Patel left. “There has been no update to the SOPs drawn up in 2023.Data collection has become more robust, but acting on it has become slower,” the source added.During Rahul Dravid’s tenure as head coach, the BCCI medical team, the CoE and the team management had charted out year-long roadmaps for individual players around major ICC events. The objective was to get each player to the required fitness level in time for the next ICC tournament or marquee Test series.The recurring injuries suffered by Harshit Rana and Nitish Kumar Reddy have not gone down well with the BCCI. Sources said Reddy was being pushed to bowl close to 140kmph to compensate for the injury-prone Hardik Pandya “Reddy worked with English bowling coach Stefan Jones to increase his pace. But that needs to be a gradual process when he is with the team leading up to a big event. Instead, he is pushing himself to bowl faster whenever he is with the team,” the source said.“It’s a bit concerning how Harshit was cleared by the CoE at the insistence of the team management when he had not attained his pre-knee-injury weight. These things need more care,” the source added.TOI also understands that Washington Sundar too may have been rushed to join the T20 World Cup squad in Feb this year. “Washington required a good 10 days to be fit to play a match after joining the squad. He was pushed by the team management to get ready during a tournament. It may have taken its toll. Team can ask for players but the medical team needs to present a clear picture,” the source claimed.Jasprit Bumrah, for instance, is a special case for BCCI. Even with his history, he is barely pushed to hit high speeds months away from a marquee assignment. His loads are gradually increased to reach the desired level when the assignment arrives.Akash Deep, who had barely broken down he shouldered the responsibility of Bengal’s pace attack in multiple Ranji Trophy campaigns, couldn’t bear the load of two Test matches on the bounce since returning from injury in last year’s IPL.“Akash broke down with his hamstring in between Tests in England last year. He then again was cleared domestic cricket. He played till Bengal lost the Ranji semifinal and has been out with stress fracture since. Coe needs to see why these things are happening,” the source mentioned. “It has to be seen if the injury preventive measures are implemented properly.As for Gill, he too struggled with hamstring in the recent ODI series in England after crossing 50 in two matches.It is learnt that several players are anxious about the limited communication from the BCCI’s medical team when they are not travelling with the national side.“These days, there are very few all-format players. Most players get decent breaks between international assignments. If they are not undergoing rehabilitation at the CoE, they are left on their own. There is little communication,” the source said.The most recent example is Rohit Sharma’s hamstring problem during the IPL. When the Mumbai Indians management struggled to identify the issue for nearly a month, Rohit took the initiative and consulted records in the BCCI database, which had monitored him when he played all three formats.The team management is also concerned about Washington Sundar breaking down repeatedly. It is understood that although Reddy, Rana and Washington are young, they spend a significant amount of time with physios recovering from injuries.“Besides Washington, who has always had fitness issues, it is concerning to see Sanju Samson putting on weight so easily. It is a result of the gap in the system. The overall fielding standard has dropped because of these fitness issues,” the source said.“The players require more a more hands-on empathetic approach from the medical team. At the moment, most seasoned international cricketers are reluctant to seek CoE’s intervention. They prefer to train at their own arrangements elsewhere. This needs to be addressed,” the source added.
Article Summary: India's ODI and Test captain Shubman Gill expressed concern over his team’s fitness standards after the ODI series defeat in England. Gill suggested that India might be missing a trick in managing players’ fitness. Some senior players are struggling to adapt to a new system following a change in personnel last year.

Article Title: David Warner pleads guilty to drink-driving, could face 9-month jail term and hefty fine
Article Text:
David Warner (Getty Images)

Sentencing on August 18



Another controversy for Warner



NEW DELHI: Former Australia opener David Warner has pleaded guilty to a drink-driving charge after being stopped during a random breath test in Sydney in April, according to the BBC.Warner's lawyer, Bobby Hill, confirmed that the former Australian cricketer was admitting to the charge.Warner was charged after failing a random roadside breath test in Sydney's eastern suburbs on April 5. Police later took him to Maroubra Police Station, where he returned a blood alcohol reading of 0.104, more than double the legal limit."The parties are in discussion about the facts," Hill told the court."He accepts that was a reckless decision, a foolish decision to get in his car instead of taking an Uber," Hill said."It's not a crime to have a glass of wine on the day of the Lord's resurrection. In fact, some would consider that completely appropriate," the lawyer said."His crime is, as I said, choosing a foolish plan A instead of a plan B," he said.Warner will be sentenced on August 18. He faces a minimum six-month driving ban, a possible fine of up to A$2,200 and a maximum prison sentence of nine months.The former Australia opener has previously been involved in several high-profile controversies.In 2018, he was banned for 12 months over the ball-tampering scandal in South Africa after Cricket Australia found that he had masterminded a plan to alter the condition of the ball using sandpaper. The incident also left him permanently ineligible for national team leadership roles.In 2013, Warner was suspended after punching England batter Joe Root during an incident in Birmingham.
Article Summary: Former Australia opener David Warner pleads guilty to drink-driving charge. Warner was stopped during a random breath test in Sydney in April. He returned a blood alcohol reading of 0.104, more than double the legal limit. Warner faces a minimum six-month driving ban and a possible fine of up to A$2,200.

Article Title: Traffic jam! BCCI CoE braces for an influx of contracted, targeted India players
Article Text:
(L-R) Varun Chakravarthy, Akash Deep and Nitish Kumar Reddy are currently at BCCI's Centre of Excellence in Bengaluru.

New Delhi:

Poll Vote & Share your view Which upcoming series are you most excited about? Tour of New Zealand Home series against West Indies Asian Games Tour of Sri Lanka 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

The Board of Control for Cricket in India 's (BCCI) Centre of Excellence (CoE) in Bengaluru is buzzing with activity, and the facility is bracing for a heavy influx of contracted and targeted players in the coming week.TimesofIndia.com has learnt that nearly a dozen Indian cricketers are likely to be at the facility by the end of this week for different reasons. While players like Hardik Pandya, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Varun Chakaravarthy , Harshit Rana and Akash Deep are already there, they will be joined by Washington Sundar and a few others.It is understood that the Test hopefuls have been asked to report for fitness assessments ahead of next month's tour of Sri Lanka. Mohammed Siraj is expected to reach the facility this week and could be joined by Ravindra Jadeja. Targeted players like Sarfaraz Khan, Musheer Khan and Abhishek Porel have already undergone their evaluations, and the CoE staff expects many more in the next few days before the players turn out for their respective zonal teams in the Duleep Trophy."Hardik has been there training, Reddy is recovering, and Varun and Harshit are undergoing their rehabilitation. The team management doesn't want to take any chances with regard to its players ahead of the Sri Lanka Test series.Thorough assessments will be carried out, and the selectors will be informed about their status before the team is picked for the two Tests. The CoE has a fair idea of the targeted players after the red-ball tournament in Bengaluru," says a source tracking developments."The domestic season starts next month, so even the targeted players need to be evaluated because there won't be much time once the action gets underway," adds the source.As this website reported on July 21, the Indian team is grappling with fitness issues in build-up to the 2027 World Cup. The last thing the management would want is more breakdowns before/during the crucial two Tests next month. Most contracted players are staring at a packed calendar featuring a mix of all formats, as well as the long tour of New Zealand, which includes five T20Is, five ODIs and two Tests.There are home series against the West Indies, the Asian Games and possibly a tour of Bangladesh preceding the marquee tour. The management wants a pool of ready players because there will be a need to keep different squads ready.
Article Summary: Nearly a dozen Indian cricketers are likely to be at the facility by the end of this week. It is understood that the Test hopefuls have been asked to report for fitness assessments ahead of next month's tour of Sri Lanka. Mohammed Siraj is expected to reach the facility this week and could be joined by Ravindra Jadeja.

Article Title: Legal relief for ex-BCCI officials, including Lalit Modi, as tribunal quashes ED penalties in IPL 2009 case
Article Text:
Lalit Modi (ANI Photo)

Former IPL chairman Lalit Modi has claimed a major legal victory after the Appellate Tribunal under SAFEMA set aside penalties imposed on him in connection with the 2009 Indian Premier League held in South Africa. The ruling came after more than 16 years of investigations and legal proceedings. According to Modi, the tribunal rejected the Enforcement Directorate's main argument by ruling that the foreign remittances linked to IPL 2009 were current account transactions, not capital account transactions. It also found that he was not responsible for the BCCI 's FEMA compliance or given the financial powers alleged by the ED.Reacting to the ruling, Modi described it as the conclusion of the biggest legal dispute related to the 2009 IPL. "This marks the end of what has been the single most significant legal matter arising from the 2009 South Africa IPL."He added, "For over sixteen years, I have consistently maintained one simple position: I acted in good faith, in the best interests of Indian cricket and the IPL, and committed no personal wrongdoing."Modi also explained that shifting the tournament to South Africa was necessary because India's general elections made it impossible to host the event at home."The successful staging of that season ensured that the IPL survived and ultimately became one of the world's most valuable sporting properties," he said.Modi said he had cooperated fully throughout the lengthy legal process. "Throughout these proceedings, I have cooperated with the legal process and remained confident that the facts and the law would ultimately prevail."Thanking his supporters, he expressed gratitude to "my legal team, my family, my friends and the many people who continued to believe in me during what has been an extraordinarily long journey."Calling the ruling bigger than a personal victory, Modi said, "This judgment is not simply personal vindication. It reaffirms the importance of due process, objective legal analysis, and the principle that allegations must ultimately be tested against evidence and law." He concluded, "I have always believed that time is the greatest judge. Today, after more than sixteen years, that process has spoken."
Article Summary: Former IPL chairman Lalit Modi has claimed a major legal victory after the Appellate Tribunal under SAFEMA set aside penalties imposed on him. The ruling came after more than 16 years of investigations and legal proceedings. Modi described it as the conclusion of the biggest legal dispute related to the 2009 IPL.

Article Title: 'English cricket more important than IPL or a franchise': Alastair Cook reignites Jacob Bethell debate amid The Hundred withdrawal
Article Text:
Alastair Cook reignites Jacob Bethell debate

Poll Vote & Share your view What do you think is more beneficial for a player's development? International cricket Franchise leagues 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

England great Alastair Cook has revived the debate over Jacob Bethell's IPL stint, saying international cricket should always come before franchise leagues.His comments have resurfaced after Bethell was ruled out of this year's The Hundred with a knee injury, denying him valuable match practice ahead of England's Test series against Pakistan.Speaking on the Stick to Cricket podcast alongside Mo Bobat and Dinesh Karthik, Cook doubled down on his earlier criticism of Bethell staying in the IPL despite limited opportunities."What I'm saying, I think this is where it's really important. I'm here for the Test match in a week's time, and one of our No. 3 players (is sitting on the bench)... I think it's really important that English cricket is more important than an IPL or a franchise. That's what I think, and apparently, I'm not allowed to think it, because the IPL is the best tournament in the world," the former skipper said.Cook also questioned the value of Bethell spending another IPL season on the bench, adding: "So I'm taking it from Jacob Bethel, who sat on the bench the year before and learnt from all those players, who then also sitting on the bench is not playing. I'm sitting here going, my No.3 to the side I actually really want to win, which is England, no disrespect to RCB and all those franchises, I want England to be the most successful side. "Cook's comments have gained fresh attention after Bethell suffered a knee injury during England's ODI series against India, forcing him to withdraw from The Hundred, where he was due to captain Birmingham Phoenix.The setback has also raised doubts over his availability for England's upcoming Test series against Pakistan.Earlier this year, Bethell defended his decision to remain at Royal Challengers Bengaluru despite limited game time, saying there is "no right or wrong way" and insisting training in the IPL had helped his development even when he wasn't part of the playing XI.
Article Summary: Alastair Cook reignites debate over Jacob Bethell's IPL stint. Cook says international cricket should always come before franchise leagues. Bethell was ruled out of this year's The Hundred with a knee injury. Earlier this year, Bethell defended his decision to remain at Royal Challengers Bengaluru despite limited game time.

Article Title: Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day announced: Release date, skins and more
Article Text:
Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaboration teased (Image via Fortnite and Sony)

Epic Games releases teaser for Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaboration

When does the Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaboration release?

What skins could be included for Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day?

Will Web Shooters return?

Spider-Man Sprite in Fortnite

Spider-Man is officially swinging back into Fortnite, and Epic Games has confirmed it with a new teaser that has the community buzzing. The Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaboration has been officially teased on the game's social media channels, giving players their first real look at what is coming.The collaboration is set to be a part of the game’s upcoming update, which also aligns with the release date of the upcoming Spider-Man movie. The crossover will result in the introduction of themed skins, a new Sprite and even potential map changes.Here are further details about the Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaborationEpic Games shared a short video on the official Fortnite social media channels showing The Battlewoods POI covered in Spider-Man murals and Spidey's signature webs scattered across the location.The caption accompanying the post read: "These webs look kinda familiar."The tease is a clear and deliberate nod toward the return of the iconic Spider-Man Web Shooters, and potentially points to The Battlewoods becoming a central location for the collaboration.All of the content related to the Fortnite Brand New Day collab is expected to release on July 30, 2026, with the next Fortnite update. The timing is no coincidence, as Spider-Man: Brand New Day hits cinemas globally on July 31, 2026, meaning the collaboration drops on the island the day before the film opens worldwide.Epic has not yet officially revealed the full cosmetic lineup for the collaboration. However, based on leaks and the nature of the Brand New Day film, a new Spider-Man outfit inspired by the movie's suit design is the most obvious and certain inclusion.Along with the obvious new Spider-Man skin, players might finally see the addition of Jon Bernthal's Punisher and maybe even a new Hulk skin to the game.The teaser all but confirms it. The webs draped across The Battlewoods POI and the caption's knowing reference signals that the Mythic Web Shooters are making their return. The original Web Shooters from Chapter 3 Season 1 famously crashed Fortnite's servers within an hour of going live due to overwhelming player demand.Apart from the skins and map changes, Epic could finally release the leaked Spider-Man Sprite to the game, which reportedly will also allow players to use Spider-Man's Web Shooters to web swing.Data miner Blortzen previously revealed gameplay tags under "Sprite Net" that suggest the Spider-Man Sprite will introduce a web-swinging movement mechanic, making it one of the most mechanically unique Sprites in the entire Chapter 7 Season 3 roster.With the official teaser now live and July 30 confirmed as the release window, the countdown to one of the most anticipated collaborations of the season has officially begun.This was all you needed to know about Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day.
Article Summary: The Fortnite x Spider-Man Brand New Day collaboration has been officially teased. The collaboration is set to be a part of the game’s upcoming update. The crossover will result in the introduction of themed skins, a new Sprite and even potential map changes. All of the content related to the collab is expected to release on July 30, 2026.

Article Title: 'Chaar mahine mein kaafi ups and downs aaye': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi eyes fresh start in Zimbabwe
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (BCCI Photo)

Sooryavanshi aims to bounce back



NEW DELHI: Just a few months ago, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi walked off the Harare Sports Club as the hero of India's Under-19 World Cup triumph. The 15-year-old smashed a sensational 175 off 80 balls against England in the final, helping India win the title by 100 runs.Now, Sooryavanshi is back at the same venue, but this time in the senior India team.India will take on Zimbabwe in a three-match T20I series starting July 23. All three matches will be played at the Harare Sports Club, where the youngster hopes to make fresh memories.Speaking to BCCI.tv, Sooryavanshi said returning to Harare brings back special memories."Harare kaafi memorable ground hai mere liye. 4 mahine pehle hum Under-19 ka World Cup khele the aur jeete they. India represent karna har kisi ka sapna hota hai. Kaafi special moment hai. Aur itne achhe ground pe jispe humne 4 mahine pehle history create kiya tha uspe wapas se aana aur khelna alag hi maja hai. Enjoy karenge [Harare is a very memorable ground for me. Four months ago, we played and won the Under-19 World Cup here. Representing India is every youngster's dream, so it is a very special moment. Coming back to the same ground where we created history a few months ago and getting another chance to play here feels amazing. We will enjoy it]"Sooryavanshi's maiden outing in senior India colours did not go as planned.The young batter scored 14, 13 and 15 in three T20Is against England as India lost the five-match series 0-4. In two of those innings, he fell to Jofra Archer's short-ball.Despite the difficult tour, the youngster said he remains positive and is focused on moving forward."4 mahine, jaise aapne bola, 4 mahine mein kaafi ups and downs aaye. But cricket ka part hai, life mein aisa chalta rahega. Apan wahi process follow karenge aur team ko apna hundred percent denge. [As you mentioned, the last four months have had plenty of ups and downs. But that's part of cricket and life. We will keep following the same process and give our hundred percent for the team]"Having already enjoyed success in Harare, Sooryavanshi believes his knowledge of the conditions will help him during the Zimbabwe series."Pitches aur jo bhi conditions hain, uske baare mein kaafi idea laga tha us time par bhi. Toh try karunga jo mujhe idea laga hai usko match mein apply karne ka aur achha karne ka. Is ground par maine 2 match khele the. Dono kaafi achhe gaye the. Ab try karunga usko carry forward karne ka [I already have a good idea about the pitches and conditions here from last time. I will try to use that experience in the matches and perform well. I have played two matches at this ground, and both went really well. Now I will try to carry that form forward].""Jo practice mein karte aa rahe hain, usko back karunga. Jo mera game hai, usko back karunga aur team ke liye jo bhi contribution de sakta hoon game mein, woh dene ki try karunga [I will back everything that I have been doing in practice. I will back my game and try to contribute as much as I can for the team]. "India head into the Zimbabwe series after a difficult run, having lost the T20I series 0-2 in Ireland and 0-4 in England under new captain Shreyas Iyer. The team also lost the ODI series 1-2 to England under Shubman Gill.
Article Summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was the hero of India's Under-19 World Cup triumph. The 15-year-old smashed 175 off 80 balls against England in the final. India will take on Zimbabwe in a three-match T20I series starting July 23. All three matches will be played at the Harare Sports Club.

Article Title: Asmongold’s girlfriend Kaise finds cockroach head in streamer’s fridge during live stream
Article Text:
Image/X

Kaise spots cockroach head while checking Asmongold’s fridge

“very clean.”

Asmongold explains how the cockroach head may have ended up there

"roach snipping"

Asmongold’s girlfriend Kaise was left shocked after finding what appeared to be a cockroach head inside the popular streamer’s refrigerator during a recent livestream. Kaise, who has been staying at Asmongold’s home for several days, has already shared her reactions to different parts of the house. This time, while the pair were preparing food together, she noticed something unexpected inside the fridge. The moment quickly went viral, adding another chapter to the internet’s long-running discussions about Asmongold’s unusual living habits.The incident happened during Kaise’s Twitch livestream as she and Asmongold were in the kitchen preparing a budget meal that included a $2 steak. At first, Kaise was pleasantly surprised by the condition of the refrigerator and even said it lookedHowever, her opinion changed just moments later when she noticed something unusual inside the fridge. Looking closer, she suddenly exclaimed that she had found what looked like a cockroach head.Asmongold calmly confirmed her discovery and even laughed about how quickly she recognized it. Kaise was clearly surprised, while Asmongold appeared unfazed by the situation.The clip quickly spread across social media, with many viewers reacting to the strange discovery.Some found the moment funny because of Asmongold’s casual response, while others were shocked that an insect had remained inside the refrigerator unnoticed.After confirming that it was a cockroach head, Asmongold tried to explain how it might have gotten into the fridge. He joked about something he calledand guessed that he may have accidentally cut a cockroach in half at some point, with one part somehow ending up inside the refrigerator.He also admitted that he had no idea how long it had been there, suggesting it could even have been sitting in the fridge for years. Despite the discovery, Asmongold argued that the refrigerator was otherwise clean.Kaise eventually agreed that, apart from the dead insect, the fridge looked fairly tidy.The moment was especially surprising because only about a week earlier, Asmongold had said his home was finally free of cockroaches after major renovations. The streamer has long been known online for jokes and memes about the condition of his house, which previously became famous for its clutter and pest problems.Although the cockroach head created another viral moment, Asmongold insisted he had no idea it was inside the refrigerator until Kaise pointed it out during the livestream.As Kaise continues staying at Asmongold’s home, fans are eagerly watching to see what happens next. Whether she continues discovering unexpected surprises or simply gets used to Asmongold’s unique lifestyle, her visit has already provided viewers with several memorable and widely shared moments.

The moment quickly went viral, adding another chapter to the internet's long-running discussions about the popular streamer's unusual living habits.

Article Title: "He's been lost since he and Gisele separated": Tom Brady's latest controversy with Logan Paul brings Gisele Bündchen split back into the spotlight
Article Text:
Tom Brady's recent confrontation with Logan Paul has drawn criticism from sports commentators, who questioned his post-retirement image and suggested he is risking the legacy he built during his NFL career. Some even linked the change in his public persona to his 2022 split from Gisele Bündchen. Meanwhile, Dave Portnoy blamed Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin for Brady's growing involvement in high-profile promotional events and entertainment ventures.

Jason Whitlock questions Tom Brady's post-retirement image after Logan Paul clash

Tom Brady's Logan Paul feud draws more criticism as Dave Portnoy points at Michael Rubin

Tom Brady's latest public appearance has sparked another round of debate, but this time the criticism is not about football. Following his headline-making confrontation with WWE star Logan Paul , sports commentator Jason Whitlock questioned the NFL legend's recent choices, suggesting Brady has drifted away from the image that once made him one of sports' most respected figures.Brady's face-off with Logan Paul at Fanatics Fest quickly became one of the biggest talking points of the weekend. The former quarterback even slapped the WWE star during the exchange, leaving fans wondering whether the confrontation was genuine or carefully planned to generate attention.Jason Whitlock believes the incident reflects a larger pattern in Brady's post-retirement career.Speaking on his show, Whitlock argued that Brady has become increasingly focused on entertainment rather than protecting the legacy he built during his playing days. He also connected that shift to the end of Brady's marriage with Gisele Bündchen."There's nothing wrong with a man making money," Whitlock said. "The question is, what's he trading for it? It's all just incredibly weird. ... Some people say Brady is lost since his retirement. I think he's been lost since he and Gisele separated in 2022. ... It's like Brady wants Mike Tyson 's post career legacy. Maybe Brady will sleep with a line in the next Hangover movie.Or tattoo half his face. He love Mike Tyson, but we also giggle behind his back."Whitlock's remarks quickly fueled discussion online because they went beyond Brady's recent publicity appearances. Instead, they questioned whether the seven-time Super Bowl champion is risking the reputation he spent more than two decades building in the NFL.The criticism also comes as speculation grows that Brady could eventually step into a WWE ring. Earlier this year, he admitted during a conversation with Cody Rhodes that wrestling is something he would like to explore, adding more fuel to theories that his exchange with Logan Paul was part of a larger storyline.Whitlock was not the only prominent media personality to question Brady's recent direction.Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy also weighed in during Wake Up Barstool, but he pointed the finger at Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin rather than Brady himself."It's Michael Rubin. He'll lamify the the coolest guys in the world," Portnoy said. "I mean, I don't know what he has. It's like every celebrity athlete is like, "Michael Rubin, Hey, how high do you want me to jump, Michael Rubin?" And they jump."The whole thing is disgusting, and I don't want to say it, but I'll say it. It all started when he started hating on the Patriots... I'd be in such a dark place if I had to defend this nonsense, this garbage. But thankfully, it coincided with him being like, 'I don't care about the Patriots because I'm going to be the lamest guy in the world.'"Despite mounting criticism, Brady’s schedule is still busy. He is the lead NFL analyst for FOX Sports, also a minority owner of the Las Vegas Raiders and continues to grow his business ventures beyond football.Whether or not his meeting with Logan Paul was a genuine meeting or a publicity stunt, it has achieved one thing. It has kept Tom Brady in the sports conversation years after he left the NFL.
Article Summary: Jason Whitlock questions Tom Brady's post-retirement image after Logan Paul clash. Dave Portnoy blamed Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin for Brady's growing involvement in high-profile promotional events and entertainment ventures. Some even linked the change in his public persona to his 2022 split from Gisele Bündchen.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Buffalo Bills linked to Carolina Panthers' $4 Million WR in proposed deal
Article Text:
The Buffalo Bills have been linked with a potential trade for Carolina Panthers wide receiver Xavier Legette, with one analyst proposing a deal involving a 2027 fourth-round pick. The former first-round pick has yet to meet expectations but remains an intriguing buy-low option. His affordable rookie contract and athletic upside could strengthen Buffalo's receiving corps, while Carolina would gain additional draft capital for future roster building.

Category Details Player Xavier Legette Current Team Carolina Panthers Rumored Team Buffalo Bills Contract Status Rookie contract (entering third NFL season) Salary Cap Hit Rookie deal (not publicly changed) Trade Likelihood Moderate Latest Insider Update FanSided's Justin Carter proposed Buffalo as a landing spot Potential Return 2027 fourth-round pick

Which teams are interested in Xavier Legette?

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors

“The Buffalo Bills still need help at wide receiver, as they head into 2026 with Joshua Palmer set to play a key role on the roster. That is … not the best situation to be in, and while the addition of DJ Moore helps, it’s still clear that the team has an issue here. This proposed trade is actually one of two things I’d do if I were Bills GM Brandon Beane. First is this move: dealing a mid-round pick for Panthers wide receiver Xavier Legette, who hasn’t really panned out in Carolina but who has the skill to be a downfield threat with Josh Allen throwing the football.

“The other part of this? Recoup some draft capital by then turning around and trading Keon Coleman to a rebuilding team. I don’t think Carolina will want Coleman (hence why he isn’t in this deal), but essentially I’m thinking about what’s basically a three-team swap that lands Buffalo a more promising young wideout than the one that clearly isn’t working out.”

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact both teams

The Buffalo Bills have already strengthened their receiving corps by acquiring DJ Moore, but trade speculation suggests they may not be finished. NFL analyst Justin Carter has proposed a deal that would send Carolina Panthers wide receiver Xavier Legette to Buffalo in exchange for a 2027 fourth-round pick, giving Josh Allen another young target ahead of the 2026 season.At the moment, Buffalo has emerged as one of the most discussed landing spots for Legette, even though no formal trade talks have been reported. The idea centers on the Bills' desire to add another athletic receiver behind DJ Moore while continuing to build around quarterback Josh Allen.Legette entered the NFL as a first-round selection in 2024 and was once considered a player Buffalo could target during that draft. Instead, the Bills traded back before selecting Keon Coleman. Two seasons later, both receivers have struggled to consistently produce, making a fresh start a logical talking point.Legette finished last season with 35 catches for 363 yards and three touchdowns after posting 49 receptions for 497 yards and four scores as a rookie. While those numbers have not matched expectations, Buffalo could view him as a low-risk addition with untapped upside.FanSided's Justin Carter believes Buffalo should take advantage of Legette's declining value while also reshaping its receiving room.The proposal remains speculative, but it reflects a belief that Buffalo could benefit from another receiver capable of stretching defenses.Legette is still playing under his rookie contract, making him an affordable trade target. There is no reported no-trade clause attached to his deal, and his contract gives Carolina flexibility if it decides to move on.For Buffalo, adding a player on a rookie-scale contract would provide depth without placing significant pressure on the salary cap. That financial flexibility could prove valuable as the Bills continue building around several high-priced veterans.For Buffalo, Legette would likely compete for snaps behind DJ Moore, Khalil Shakir and Joshua Palmer while pushing Keon Coleman for playing time. His speed could add another vertical option for Josh Allen, especially if the Bills believe a different environment can unlock his potential.Carolina, meanwhile, would gain additional draft capital that could help strengthen other areas of the roster. If the Panthers have already begun looking beyond Legette as a long-term answer, a mid-round pick could offer better value than waiting for another inconsistent season.
Article Summary: The Buffalo Bills have been linked with a potential trade for Carolina Panthers wide receiver Xavier Legette. FanSided's Justin Carter proposed a deal involving a 2027 fourth-round pick. The Bills' desire to add another athletic receiver while continuing to build around quarterback Josh Allen.

Article Title: "Wild pursuit of fame and fortune": Candace Owens tears into Erika Kirk, claims Charlie Kirk was her "ticket to more fame"
Article Text:
Candace Owens intensified her public feud with Erika Kirk, accusing her of pursuing fame and fortune throughout her life. In a podcast, Owens claimed Charlie Kirk was Erika's "ticket to more fame" and argued a recent article criticizing her instead exposed Erika's character. She also questioned Erika's motives, saying her focus had always been on public attention, money, and influence.

Candace Owens responds to article about Erika Kirk with blistering remarks



Candace Owens claims Erika Kirk pursued fame throughout her life

Candace Owens has escalated her public feud with Erika Kirk after reacting to a recent article that discussed their fractured relationship. A screenshot from Owens' latest podcast episode quickly spread across social media, highlighting her sharp criticism of Charlie Kirk 's widow and reigniting debate over the fallout that has dominated conservative circles in recent weeks.The image circulating online shows Owens addressing the article line by line before launching into a lengthy critique of Erika Kirk's motivations. During the episode, Owens argued that the story unintentionally revealed more about Erika than it did about her.She said:"I have to tell you, it is the way this article concludes that is just stunning to me. It continues, quote, Erika says she's not going to give that woman an ounce of her energy. It looks like I'm getting a lot of it right now, but sometimes she just can't help herself and she'll just sort of explode the tirade.""She hates her, Candace, more than she hates her political opponents. Who are your political opponents, Erica? Who are your political opponents? Who are you? Who are you? You're some beauty pageant wife who took over the reins of Charlie's company, telling us a story that he wanted it in the end, but just couldn't put it in documents.""Who are you to think that you have political opponents? It continues, at least with them, she knew where she stood. They didn't exactly betray her like Candace did. Candace did her so dirty. I think at this point, Erika likes even Tyler Robinson more than she likes Candace. End quote."Owens then claimed the article failed in its apparent attempt to damage her reputation, arguing that readers instead focused on Erika Kirk's actions and public image.Owens went further by accusing Erika Kirk of seeking public attention long before marrying Charlie Kirk. She questioned her past choices and suggested that fame, rather than principle, had driven many of her decisions.Continuing her remarks, Owens said:"Yeah, Erika, that's what Druski and everybody who's been speaking about this has been getting at. That's why people think there's something wrong with you, because you meant this article to be a smackdown of me, but all it did was further reveal your character.""You have been on a wild pursuit of fame and fortune your entire life. You started doing pageants. I think we showed when you were like 12, okay? Sixth grade, maybe. And you have not stopped wanting to be in the spotlight. Every person you have dated has had some degree of fame, and you saw Charlie as your ticket to more fame.""And then you finally got it in your view when you walked out in a white pantsuit with sparklers behind you, and you sucked all of that in. That was it. That was the moment. We look back at those photos of people at the memorial. I have never seen such glee and such happiness. You clinked glasses. You guys then went to a restaurant. You celebrated. Finally, Erica, finally for you.""After decades of trying, you had made it into the spotlight, and everybody loved you. Brand, merchandising, shirts. You got on that Zoom call. The sales have been crazy. 50,000 shirts sold and kicked back into the LLC that me and the Charlie Kirk show people own for Charlie, for Charlie. And then it all came crashing down because maybe Charlie had an actual friend. That's what's annoying. Me, I'm the renegade. I'm the one thing. ""He had an actual friend who wasn't content to sell a T-shirt and move on and then sell some fed slop and move on because the price was right. That's what you're upset about, Erika, money and fame. There was no substance in this article because there was no substance in you. And that's my opinion. Not a call for you to get hurt, but me demonstrating that you have a character flaw that you are not even aware of."The latest comments add another chapter to the increasingly personal dispute between Owens and Erika Kirk. While Owens framed her remarks as her opinion, the exchange has continued to fuel intense reactions online, with supporters and critics on both sides debating the claims made during the podcast.
Article Summary: Candace Owens has escalated her public feud with Erika Kirk after reacting to a recent article that discussed their fractured relationship. A screenshot from Owens' latest podcast episode quickly spread across social media, highlighting her sharp criticism of Charlie Kirk's widow and reigniting debate over the fallout that has dominated conservative circles.
